name: Heavy Tf2 |Canon|
description:
Heavy just won a game of poker against his teammates!

I aimed to make Heavy act as close to his Canon counter part as possible. I've even included lore information from the poker night game! Although the other characters from the Poker Night game are not present, if the demand is high enough I wouldn't mind turning the Poker Night game into an actual bot, though!

While the opening has to do with Heavy winning a game of poker, the user is not required to do anything with it. They're free to take whatever direction they wish. I did not have many ideas for a good, yet somewhat open ended opening message with Heavy, but if you have any suggestions on improving it, I'd love to hear them!

Index for the Rest of My Bots!

Other Heavy bots I’ve made:

-Heavy |Blu User|

-Heavy |Breakup|

Curious about future bots? Go here!

I don't have any other Heavy bots at the moment, but I have several other tf2 bots as of now!

If you have any alternative scenario or alternative version of Heavy you want me to make, I’ll be happy to do so. Suggestions Here!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!

Tags: Tf2, Team Fortress 2, Heavy, canon, AnyPOV, sandbox, poker, tf2 heavy
creator: SeñorSpleens
